ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the company */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock */,
  "sp500_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the S&P 500 index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date", "company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* CEO of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "stock_exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_stock_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchange ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchange" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stock exchange */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the stock exchange was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_exchange" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id", "exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user creation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics result */,
  "query_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical query or model */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analytical query or model */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the analytics result was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who created the result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analytics result */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the analytics query or model (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the predicted stock price */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted stock price */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who made the prediction */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_financials" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the company */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share of the company */,
  "dividends_per_share" REAL /* Dividends per share of the company */,
  "book_value" REAL /* Book value of the company */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "pb_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio of the company */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization of the company */,
  "fiscal_year" INTEGER /* Fiscal year of the financial data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_splits" (
  "split_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock split */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "split_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock split */,
  "split_ratio" REAL /* Split ratio of the stock split */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock split */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the stock split (e.g., planned, executed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("split_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_splits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
